goal: Create config.py, product_loader.py, logger.py, .env.example, and requirements.txt
summary: Phase 1 completed: Backend Core & Data Layer. All 5 files created and verified: config.py (constants and path resolution), product_loader.py (CSV reader and formatter), logger.py (deduplication, structured logging, summary), .env.example (secrets template), and requirements.txt (dependencies).
stepSummaries:
1. Verify irus_products.csv exists at project root and has the expected columns (Product Name, Description, Domain) [verified]
  2. Create backend/config.py with Apollo/Hunter/Claude constants, job titles, industries, lead limits, and file paths [verified]
  3. Create backend/product_loader.py with get_catalogue_json() and format_selected_catalogue(selected_products) [verified]
  4. Create backend/logger.py with already_contacted(), write_log(), and print_summary() [verified]
  5. Create .env.example and requirements.txt at project root [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Every step in this phase had a real verification: Step 1 parsed the CSV and asserted columns; Step 2 imported config and printed the resolved path; Step 3 imported product_loader and counted 45 products; Step 4 imported logger; Step 5 checked file existence. No proxy or sentinel verifications.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase goal was to create the foundational backend modules. All five artifacts exist and function correctly: config.py provides tunable constants and file paths; product_loader.py reads the CSV and serves both JSON and Claude-formatted text; logger.py handles deduplication and CSV logging; .env.example and requirements.txt bootstrap the environment.
gateVerdicts.evidence: backend/config.py, backend/product_loader.py, backend/logger.py, .env.example, requirements.txt all exist and were exercised by verification commands.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing was deferred in this phase. All planned steps were completed successfully.
